name: Account Engagement Velocity
description: Surface accounts that are warming up vs. cooling down vs. stalled: the trajectory question that decides where ABM should focus this week. Replaces weekly manual account reviews that can't reach every account.
alsoSurfaces: Which target accounts are accelerating right now?
Which accounts cooled despite earlier engagement?
Which accounts have never engaged and should be re-evaluated?
How does velocity differ across tiers and segments?
beforeWeRun: Account list: target accounts only, or include named-account list?
Velocity window: trailing 4 weeks (8-week baseline) or custom?
Signal types: all connected, or filter to specific channels?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Target account count + accelerating / decelerating / stalled / cooled-out counts.

whatYoullGet.name: Accelerating accounts
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list with current score, velocity, signal composition, and recommended action.

whatYoullGet.name: Decelerating accounts
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of accounts cooling down, with last-touch context.

whatYoullGet.name: Stalled accounts
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of accounts with no engagement in the window.

whatYoullGet.name: Cooled-out accounts
whatYoullGet.desc: Previously-engaged accounts that lost momentum: rescue candidates.

whatYoullGet.name: All accounts table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable: score, velocity, classification, signal composition per account.

whatYoullGet.name: Velocity distribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Histogram of velocities across all accounts.

whatYoullGet.name: By tier
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked bar showing classification breakdown per tier.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your engagement-velocity dashboard in ~9 min.
